title: Closeout Requirement
description: Schema for a closeout requirement within a scope of work. Defines the deliverable type, responsible party, and timing for project closeout items.

requirement_id.description: Unique identifier for this closeout requirement.

title.description: Human-readable title for the closeout requirement.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

responsible_party.description: Party responsible for fulfilling this closeout requirement.

due_date_relative.description: Due date relative to a project milestone (e.g., '30 days after substantial completion').
